description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a modern main battle tank, featuring a large, elongated cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull is robust with angular, sloped armor plating covering the entire body, and the tracks are reinforced for traversing rough terrain. On the rear, there is a cylindrical external component, possibly a fuel tank or storage canister, and the vehicle is equipped with various hatches and periscopes for crew access and visibility. The exterior is painted in a dark, nearly black color scheme with subtle highlights and small national flag insignias on the sides. The front and rear views reveal thick frontal armor and a prominent gun barrel, while the sides display the full length of the tracks and additional equipment. The vehicle's design suggests it is built for urban and battlefield environments, prioritizing protection, firepower, and mobility.
description: A dark, heavily armored tracked tank with a large turret-mounted cannon, sloped armor, and visible national flag insignias. It features robust tracks, a rear cylindrical component, and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, turret, and tracks, with a national flag insignia visible on the hull.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the cylindrical component at the back and the width of the tracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cannon facing right, showing the turret, tracks, and another flag insignia.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the thick frontal armor, central gun barrel, and upper hull details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced on the front and turret, with visible modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark color with minimal pattern; no visible camouflage scheme.
attribute_military_markings: Small national flag insignias on both sides of the hull; no other visible markings.
